name: @pavelsavara/jsco
description: WebAssembly Component Model runtime for browsers and Node.js, with WASIp1/p2/p3 hosts

scripts.build:npm: npm run build:release && cp deploy/package.json dist/release/ && cp README.md dist/release/ && cp LICENSE dist/release/
scripts.build:integration: cd integration-tests && cargo component build --release --target wasm32-wasip1 -p consumer-p2 -p forwarder-p2 -p implementer-p2 -p hello-p2-world -p echo-reactor && cargo component build --release -p implementer-p2 --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.build:integration-p3: cd integration-tests && cargo build --release --target wasm32-wasip1 -p hello-p3-world -p implementer-p3 -p forwarder-p3 -p consumer-p3 -p join-http-p3 -p echo-server-p3 -p jspi-deadlock-repro && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-wasip1/release/hello_p3_world.wasm --adapt wasi_snapshot_preview1.reactor.wasm -o hello-p3-world/hello_p3_world.wasm && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-wasip1/release/implementer_p3.wasm --adapt wasi_snapshot_preview1.reactor.wasm -o implementer-p3/implementer_p3.wasm && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder_p3.wasm --adapt wasi_snapshot_preview1.reactor.wasm -o forwarder-p3/forwarder_p3.wasm && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-wasip1/release/consumer_p3.wasm --adapt wasi_snapshot_preview1.reactor.wasm -o consumer-p3/consumer_p3.wasm && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-wasip1/release/join_http_p3.wasm --adapt wasi_snapshot_preview1.reactor.wasm -o join-http-p3/join_http_p3.wasm && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-wasip1/release/echo_server_p3.wasm --adapt wasi_snapshot_preview1.reactor.wasm -o echo-server-p3/echo_server_p3.wasm && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-wasip1/release/jspi_deadlock_repro.wasm --adapt wasi_snapshot_preview1.reactor.wasm -o jspi-deadlock-repro/jspi_deadlock_repro.wasm
scripts.build:compositions: cd integration-tests && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder-p2=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder_p2.wasm compositions/wrapped-forwarder.wac -o compositions/wrapped-forwarder.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder-p2=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder_p2.wasm compositions/double-forwarder.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder-p2=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder_p2.wasm --dep jsco:wrapped-forwarder=compositions/wrapped-forwarder.wasm compositions/nested-double-forwarder.wac -o compositions/nested-double-forwarder.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder-p2=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder_p2.wasm --dep jsco:implementer-p2=target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/implementer_p2.wasm compositions/forwarder-implementer.wac -o compositions/forwarder-implementer.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder-p2=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder_p2.wasm --dep jsco:implementer-p2=target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/implementer_p2.wasm compositions/double-forwarder-implementer.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder-implementer.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder-p2=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder_p2.wasm --dep jsco:forwarder-implementer=compositions/forwarder-implementer.wasm compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer.wac -o compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer.wasm
scripts.build:compositions-p3: cd integration-tests && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:forwarder-p3=forwarder-p3/forwarder_p3.wasm compositions/wrapped-forwarder-p3.wac -o compositions/wrapped-forwarder-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:forwarder-p3=forwarder-p3/forwarder_p3.wasm compositions/double-forwarder-p3.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:forwarder-p3=forwarder-p3/forwarder_p3.wasm compositions/nested-double-forwarder-p3.wac -o compositions/nested-double-forwarder-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:forwarder-p3=forwarder-p3/forwarder_p3.wasm --dep jsco:implementer-p3=implementer-p3/implementer_p3.wasm compositions/forwarder-implementer-p3.wac -o compositions/forwarder-implementer-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:forwarder-p3=forwarder-p3/forwarder_p3.wasm --dep jsco:implementer-p3=implementer-p3/implementer_p3.wasm compositions/double-forwarder-implementer-p3.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder-implementer-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:forwarder-p3=forwarder-p3/forwarder_p3.wasm --dep jsco:forwarder-implementer-p3=compositions/forwarder-implementer-p3.wasm compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer-p3.wac -o compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer-p3.wasm
scripts.build:compositions-http-p3: cd integration-tests && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:server-impl-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-impl-p3.wasm --dep jsco:server-fwd-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-fwd-p3.wasm compositions/forwarder-implementer-http-p3-server.wac -o compositions/forwarder-implementer-http-p3-server.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:server-impl-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-impl-p3.wasm --dep jsco:server-fwd-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-fwd-p3.wasm compositions/double-forwarder-implementer-http-p3.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder-implementer-http-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:server-impl-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-impl-p3.wasm --dep jsco:server-fwd-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-fwd-p3.wasm compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer-http-p3.wac -o compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer-http-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:server-fwd-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-fwd-p3.wasm compositions/wrapped-forwarder-http-p3.wac -o compositions/wrapped-forwarder-http-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:server-fwd-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-fwd-p3.wasm compositions/double-forwarder-http-p3.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder-http-p3.wasm && wac compose --no-validate --dep jsco:server-fwd-http-p3=http-p3-wat/server-fwd-p3.wasm compositions/nested-double-forwarder-http-p3.wac -o compositions/nested-double-forwarder-http-p3.wasm
scripts.setup:rust: npm run setup:rust:rustup && npm run setup:rust:cargo
scripts.setup:rust:rustup: rustup toolchain install stable --profile default --no-self-update && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown

author: Pavel Savara <pavel.savara@gmail.com>
